attributes.action: Ensure Local Authorities are held accountable for SEND rights
attributes.additional_details: Children with SEND are being denied support that they are legally entitled to, even after a tribunal victory. Local Authorities are failing to follow up on their duties. Children are therefor losing vital education and support, This impacts the child's long term mental health and development.
attributes.background: Ensure Local Authorities are held legally accountable for implementing all SEND tribunal decisions and ECH Plan provision

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:

Fine Local Authorities & penalise LA officers who don’t fulfil SEND obligations
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747917
